title: Disabling Drag&Drop feature for item

posts.author: MichalJurnik (Michal Jurnik | Intelstudios.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Q: Is it possible to prevent user to drag&drop the item and allow movement between groups (automation) just by changing of status?

Business case: Let’s say I have CRM leads board. In the board, I have different groups based on process phases (New, Qualified, Contacted, etc). The movement between groups should be based on change of status and filled values. For example, to move item from New to Qualified, sales rep would need to fill company info, size of company and change status to Qualified.

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
We also need this feature, especially on the calendar and workload views.
When you scroll, you can easily do a drag and drop by inadvertance. This mess up the schedule and it’s very difficult to track back what was done.
Thank to add this in your next developments
Franck

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Michal,
I just realized that I was not able to vote for your proposal, as it is not a feature request. Could you please change this in this discussion ? Please put “Feature request” instead of “platform discussion”. This would allow people to vote for it and maybe get a little more attention from monday. Thank you
